title: coronilla viminalis
intro: Coronilla viminalis, also known as French clover, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Coronilla viminalis include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and reducing stress. Coronilla viminalis can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
